metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for rsvp-reader — a terminal-native RSVP/Spritz speed reader for Claude Code.

plugins.name: rsvp-reader
plugins.description: Terminal-native RSVP/Spritz speed reader. Provides /flash to pop a Terminal.app window flashing Claude's response at 600 WPM with Spritz-style ORP highlighting, plus a standalone rsvp CLI that works from any shell.
